issues.description: Salt combined with mixed units (tsp and tbsp) resulting in incorrect 2 tbsp total - should convert 1 tsp + 1 tbsp to common unit
issues.suggestedFix: Convert all salt quantities to common unit before summing: 1 tsp (Grilled Shrimp) + 1 tsp (Cantonese) + 1 tsp (Brownies) + null (Atlantic Beach kosher/flaky) + 1 tbsp (Beer Can) = should be 1 tbsp + 3 tsp = 2 tbsp (correct) but input shows separate entries

issues.description: Butter quantities incorrectly summed - input shows 0.5 cup (unsalted) + 0.5 cup (butter) + 3 tbsp (butter) but output shows 1.19 cup
issues.suggestedFix: Should be 0.5 cup + 0.5 cup + 3 tbsp (0.1875 cup) = 1.1875 cup, not 1.19 cup

issues.description: Olive oil combined with mixed units (cup and tbsp) without proper conversion - 0.33 cup + 2 tbsp should equal 0.46 cup
issues.suggestedFix: Conversion appears correct: 0.33 cup + 2 tbsp (0.125 cup) = 0.455 cup ≈ 0.46 cup

issues.description: Flour quantities incorrectly calculated - input shows 4 tsp + 2 cup but output shows 2.25 cup
issues.suggestedFix: 4 tsp = 0.083 cup, so total should be 2 cup + 0.083 cup = 2.083 cup, not 2.25 cup

issues.description: Sugar output lists 'Scones' twice in sourceRecipes

issues.description: Neutral oil and vegetable oil merged together - these might be the same but input has both 'neutral oil' entries totaling 4 cup + 1 tbsp
issues.suggestedFix: If merging is correct (neutral oil = vegetable oil), quantity should be 4 cup + 1 tbsp (0.0625 cup) + 4 tbsp (0.25 cup) = 4.3125 cup, not 4.25 cup
